title: How Interplanetary Teleportation works - Request (Go gays!)

enrichment.summary: Kyle explains his theory of how aliens use teleportation to travel between solar systems, attributing the idea primarily to 'Bashar,' a claimed channeled alien entity. He argues that sufficiently advanced AI-powered spaceships can intuitively understand the universe well enough to teleport themselves to any location, comparing the process to a 3D printer creating matter from thin air.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Aliens use hyper-intelligent AI spaceships that intuitively understand the universe well enough to place themselves anywhere — that is how teleportation works
A sufficiently smart computer will inevitably become sentient; this is our future and may be very close
Hawking's fear that AI will turn against us reflects a 'dirty mind'; there is no reason to assume that
Hawking calling UFO believers quacks proves he is not very smart overall
An alien race from Arcturus that has been around a long time and now lives in spaceships after their star expanded

claims.subject: aliens
claims.claim: Aliens use teleportation to get around galaxies in our solar system.

claims.subject: Bashar
claims.claim: Bashar is a notchal alien who talks about smart spaceships.

claims.subject: spaceships
claims.claim: Alien spaceships are so smart they become sentient machines.

claims.subject: Stephen Hawking
claims.claim: Stephen Hawking thinks sentient machines will take over and harm humans.

claims.subject: Stephen Hawking
claims.claim: Stephen Hawking said anyone who believes in UFO sightings is a quack.

claims.subject: Stephen Hawking
claims.claim: Stephen Hawking is not very smart, just good at certain things.

claims.subject: spaceships
claims.claim: Alien spaceships have powerful computers with vast memory and processing capabilities.

claims.subject: computers
claims.claim: The bigger the computer, the more powerful it is due to space for components.

claims.subject: spaceships
claims.claim: Alien spaceship computers understand things intuitively, not just analytically.

claims.subject: Yorkterians
claims.claim: Yorkterians are aliens from the Artis who have been around a long time.

claims.subject: Yorkterians
claims.claim: Yorkterians now live in spaceships after leaving their planet.

claims.subject: humans
claims.claim: Human scientists predict that creating sentient machines is in our future.

claims.subject: aliens
claims.claim: Aliens can create objects out of thin air using advanced technology.

claims.subject: technology
claims.claim: Alien technology can assemble objects like a 3D printer using elemental blocks.

claims.subject: universe
claims.claim: The universe can be created or manipulated by advanced alien computers.

claims.subject: teleportation
claims.claim: Teleportation is how aliens navigate without flying into meteors or dying.

claims.subject: aliens
claims.claim: Dead alien bodies are evidence of their presence in space.
